source.title: Circulating tumor DNA analysis guiding adjuvant therapy in stage II colon cancer: 5-year outcomes of the randomized DYNAMIC trial.

finding.description: 5-year recurrence-free survival was 88% with ctDNA-guided management and 87% with standard management.
finding.effect_summary: No significant difference in 5-year RFS between ctDNA-guided and standard management.

source_quote: At a median follow-up of 59.7 months, 5-year RFS was 88% and 87% with ctDNA-guided and standard management, respectively (difference 1.1%, 95% confidence interval -5.8% to 8.0%).

source.title: Circulating tumor DNA analysis guiding adjuvant therapy in stage II colon cancer: 5-year outcomes of the randomized DYNAMIC trial.

finding.description: 5-year overall survival was similar between ctDNA-guided and standard management (93.8% vs 93.3%).
finding.effect_summary: No significant difference in 5-year OS between ctDNA-guided and standard management.

source_quote: 5-year overall survival is similar (93.8% versus 93.3%, hazard ratio (HR) 1.05; P = 0.887).

source.title: Circulating tumor DNA analysis guiding adjuvant therapy in stage II colon cancer: 5-year outcomes of the randomized DYNAMIC trial.

finding.description: ctDNA clearance was observed at the end of ACT in 87.5% of treated ctDNA-positive patients.
finding.effect_summary: High rate of ctDNA clearance at the end of ACT in treated ctDNA-positive patients.

source_quote: For treated ctDNA-positive patients, ctDNA clearance was observed at the end of ACT (EOT) in 35 out of 40 patients (87.5%).

source.title: Circulating tumor DNA analysis guiding adjuvant therapy in stage II colon cancer: 5-year outcomes of the randomized DYNAMIC trial.

finding.description: Higher than median postoperative tumor-derived mutant molecules per milliliter plasma was associated with worse 5-year RFS.
finding.effect_summary: Higher ctDNA levels post-surgery linked to worse 5-year RFS.

source_quote: A higher than median postoperative tumor-derived mutant molecules per milliliter plasma was associated with worse 5-year RFS (HR 10.62; P = 0.005).

source.title: Circulating tumor DNA analysis guiding adjuvant therapy in stage II colon cancer: 5-year outcomes of the randomized DYNAMIC trial.

finding.description: Post hoc analysis showed ctDNA clearance at EOT predicted a 5-year recurrence-free probability of 97% versus 0% for ctDNA persistence.
finding.effect_summary: ctDNA clearance at EOT predicts high 5-year RFS.

source_quote: Post hoc analysis of ctDNA clearance at EOT assessed by a new assay that evaluated an average of 29 tumor-derived mutations per patient predicted for a favorable 5-year recurrence-free probability of 97% versus 0% for ctDNA persistence (P < 0.001).
